settings.title: Settings
settings.outputDevicesHint: Select every device the sounds should play through at once (e.g. your speakers and a virtual cable so others hear it too).
settings.audioGuide: How to make others hear your sounds
settings.launchMinimized: Start in background (without opening the window)

guide.title: Audio setup guide
guide.intro: By default, sounds only play on your own speakers. To have others hear them too (Discord, in-game voice chat...), you need a free virtual audio cable that SoundGee can send sound to at the same time as your speakers.
guide.step1: 1. Install VB-CABLE (free) from vb-audio.com and restart your computer if prompted.
guide.step2: 2. In SoundGee's Settings, tick "CABLE Input (VB-Audio Virtual Cable)" in Audio outputs, in addition to your normal speakers.
guide.step3: 3. In Discord (or your game), set your Microphone/Input device to "CABLE Output (VB-Audio Virtual Cable)".
guide.step4: 4. To still talk while using the soundboard, use a free mixer like Voicemeeter to combine your real microphone and VB-CABLE into a single input device.

audioSetup.title: Make others hear your sounds
audioSetup.notInstalled: You need Voicemeeter (free) to mix your microphone with SoundGee's sounds, so Discord or your games hear both at once.
audioSetup.downloadError: The automatic download failed (the link may have changed) — we opened the official page in your browser, download it from there.
audioSetup.recheckButton: I've finished installing it, check again
audioSetup.installNote: The download starts and Voicemeeter's installer opens automatically - follow its steps (it will ask for administrator rights), a restart may be requested. Come back here afterwards to finish the setup.
audioSetup.installedIntro: Voicemeeter detected! One click to configure everything automatically (mic + sounds mixing).
audioSetup.successStep: Last step, done by hand (no third-party app lets us automate this): in Discord → Settings → Voice & Video → Input Device → choose "Voicemeeter Output".
audioSetup.errorNotInstalled: Voicemeeter no longer appears to be detected. Try again after installing it.
audioSetup.errorLogin: Couldn't connect to Voicemeeter. Make sure it's installed, then try again.
audioSetup.errorLaunch: Voicemeeter couldn't be launched automatically. Open it yourself once, then try again.
